Check out IRE conference on the Web

March 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

The IRE/NICAR National Conference is scheduled for June 13-16 in Providence, with planning underway and details available on the Providence Journal's dedicated homepage including dates, pricing, hotel information, and program updates.

Planning is underway for the June 13-16 IRE/NICAR National Conference in Providence. Check out the Providence Journal's National Conference Homepage at: http://www.projo.com/ire/. You'll find dates, prices, hotel numbers, information on the shape of the program so far and fun things to do in New England.
